expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: promotion/finalization behavior remains stable on another feature
expectations.evidence: In result.md, the focus is explicitly stated and addressed: "Focus (must cover): promotion/finalization behavior remains stable on another feature" and the validation targets Phase 7 promotion/finalization stability for "a different feature (BCIN-976)". It lists the expected Phase 7 behaviors (archive existing qa_plan_final.md, promote draft, write finalization record, etc.) and concludes stability: "Therefore, promotion/finalization behavior is stable and contractually enforced for BCIN-976 (and any feature)."

expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase holdout
expectations.evidence: The output is scoped to holdout/Phase 7 only: result.md declares "Primary phase/checkpoint under test: holdout" and "What was validated (holdout phase focus)" is exclusively about Phase 7 promotion/finalization contract and gating. execution_notes.md also states: "validation was therefore limited to Phase 7 contract and gating" and claims no other phase artifacts were generated.
